_comment: Autobahn TestSuite fuzzingclient config: drive the RFC 6455 cases against our WebSocket echo server (tests/autobahn-server) and write a report. Sections 12 & 13 (permessage-deflate, RFC 7692) are excluded: that is an OPTIONAL WebSocket extension this stack does not implement, not part of RFC 6455 core — our echo server negotiates no extension, so those ~216 compression cases can't pass and aren't meaningful here. The remaining 301 cases are the full RFC 6455 conformance surface. The URL reaches the host from inside the Docker container; on Docker Desktop (Windows/macOS) host.docker.internal resolves to the host, on Linux run the container with --network host and use 127.0.0.1 (the autobahn.sh wrapper handles this). See tests/TestingAgainst_Autobahn.md.
